purpose: Vetted candidate catalog for external PM Copilot integrations. Entries are candidates, not proof of current runtime configuration.

policy.default_enable_rule: Only local/open-source or active-agent-runtime tools can be default-on. SaaS, commercial APIs, OAuth tools, and write-capable tools require explicit setup and approval.
policy.least_privilege_rule: Use read-only scopes for analytics, database, CRM, ads, support, project-management, and workspace integrations unless a user explicitly approves a write action.

tools.name: Microsoft Playwright MCP
tools.runtime: MCP server or local browser automation
tools.setup_hint: Install via the official package instructions for the active MCP client, or use PM Copilot local visual validation scripts.
tools.fallback: Use scripts/validate_prototype_visual.py and manual screenshot review.

verification.notes: Official Microsoft repo. Local browser availability still must be checked per environment.

tools.name: Context7
tools.setup_hint: Configure the MCP server in the active agent client when current library docs are needed.
tools.fallback: Use official library documentation opened in the browser.

verification.notes: High-signal docs tool; runtime availability depends on the MCP client configuration.

tools.name: GitHub MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use a least-privilege GitHub token. Do not create issues, comments, branches, or PRs without explicit user approval.
tools.fallback: Use local git/file inspection and user-provided GitHub links.

verification.notes: Official GitHub repo; private repo access depends on token scopes.

tools.name: Figma MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Requires Figma account access and configured MCP client. Treat write-to-canvas capabilities as approval-gated.
tools.fallback: Use user-provided screenshots, exported assets, or local HTML prototypes.

verification.notes: Official Figma guide. Actual access depends on Figma workspace permissions and plan.

tools.name: v0 API
tools.setup_hint: Use only with user-approved API key and billing expectations. Keep generated code isolated until reviewed.
tools.fallback: Use local prototype skill and browser validation.

verification.notes: Official API docs exist; treat as paid/commercial until the user confirms account and billing.

tools.name: Google Stitch SDK
tools.setup_hint: Use as an experimental generator only after confirming account/API access and output ownership expectations.
tools.fallback: Use local prototype skill, Figma references, or v0 when approved.

verification.notes: Google Labs repo. Keep optional because product maturity and account requirements may change.

tools.name: Firecrawl MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Requires API key unless self-hosted. Use for crawling only when terms and robots constraints are acceptable.
tools.fallback: Use agent-native browser search and manually opened sources.

verification.notes: Official repo; cloud use may be paid or rate-limited.

tools.name: Exa MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use only when Exa account/API key is supplied.
tools.fallback: Use browser search or Firecrawl when configured.

verification.notes: Official Exa repo; API-key gated.

tools.name: Tavily MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use only when Tavily account/API key is supplied.
tools.fallback: Use browser search or manually opened sources.

verification.notes: Official Tavily repo; API-key gated.

tools.name: Notion MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use a scoped Notion integration token and limit page/database access.
tools.fallback: Use exported Markdown, PDFs, or pasted product docs.

verification.notes: Official Notion repo; workspace permissions required.

tools.name: Atlassian MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use scoped Jira/Confluence access. Creating or updating tickets requires user approval.
tools.fallback: Use exported Jira/Confluence pages or user-provided ticket links.

verification.notes: Official Atlassian repo; account and site configuration required.

tools.name: Google Workspace MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use only with explicit OAuth consent and narrow scopes.
tools.fallback: Use exported Docs/Sheets/CSV files or user-provided links.

verification.notes: Useful broad connector, but community-maintained and high data exposure.

tools.name: Slack MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Start with read-only history access. Posting messages requires explicit approval.
tools.fallback: Use pasted Slack excerpts or exported discussion summaries.

verification.notes: Community repo; Slack scopes must be reviewed carefully.

tools.name: MCP Toolbox for Databases
tools.setup_hint: Use read-only database users and query allowlists for product analysis.
tools.fallback: Use CSV exports or documented metric summaries.

verification.notes: Official Google APIs repo. Actual database credentials determine risk.

tools.name: Bytebase dbhub
tools.setup_hint: Prefer read-only database credentials. Do not connect production data without approval.
tools.fallback: Use local exports or sanitized SQL snapshots.

verification.notes: Open-source database MCP candidate; runtime setup is project-specific.

tools.name: Jupyter MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use for local notebooks and sanitized exports. Review code before executing against sensitive data.
tools.fallback: Use local Python scripts, CSV summaries, or spreadsheet formulas.

verification.notes: Useful for analysis workflows; code execution risk must be controlled.

tools.name: PostHog MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use read-only analytics access when possible and avoid exporting raw user identifiers.
tools.fallback: Use PostHog CSV exports or screenshots of dashboards.

verification.notes: Official PostHog repo; workspace access and plan determine availability.

tools.name: Google Analytics 4 MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use service-account or OAuth credentials with read-only GA4 access.
tools.fallback: Use GA4 exports or dashboard screenshots.

verification.notes: Community server; verify GA4 property access and quota before use.

tools.name: Activepieces
tools.setup_hint: Use only after connected-app permissions and execution approvals are defined.
tools.fallback: Keep actions as manual runbook steps or use generated checklists.

verification.notes: Strong automation candidate, but connected app permissions drive risk.

tools.name: n8n MCP Server
tools.setup_hint: Use for workflow management only after the n8n instance and execution permissions are approved.
tools.fallback: Generate n8n workflow specs for manual import and review.

verification.notes: Community MCP wrapper; verify compatibility with the target n8n version.

tools.name: Salesforce MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use sandbox or read-only credentials for product analysis. CRM writes require explicit approval.
tools.fallback: Use exported CRM reports or anonymized customer summaries.

verification.notes: Official Salesforce CLI repo; org permissions determine availability.

tools.name: Sentry MCP
tools.setup_hint: Use read-only issue and release access for launch review and defect triage.
tools.fallback: Use pasted Sentry issue links, release notes, or exported error summaries.

verification.notes: Official Sentry repo; organization token scopes determine access.
